meta.verified_via: Direct verification of committees.docs.intersectmbo.org and budgetcommittee.docs.intersectmbo.org
meta.notes: Every committee's documentation portal was checked. Meeting counts are approximate based on listed entries.

meetings.notes: Consistent weekly minutes. Decision logs are a strong accountability feature unique to TSC.
Weekly meetings throughout both years. Dense schedule during budget season (Apr-Jul 2025).

extras: Google Drive recordings linked from some minutes
meetings.notes: Only committee with public video recordings. Longest documentation history (since Dec 2023).
Most prolific documentation — 87 meetings. Includes joint session with Intersect Board (Apr 1, 2025).
Documentation stops at October 2024. No minutes found for 2025 or 2026 — unclear if committee is still meeting.
Page exists but only mentions a 'new format' for minutes. No individual meeting notes found as of Apr 2026. Oversees ₳77.5M budget.
No public meeting minutes or notes found. Meeting notes URL returns 404. Oversees ₳11.3M governance budget.
Terms of reference mention recordings should be posted on YouTube/GitBook, but no actual links found. Oversees ₳20.4M marketing budget.
New for 2026. No public documentation found.

summary.note: 6 of 10 committees publish meeting minutes. Only OSC has public video recordings. 3 committees (CCC, GMC, Oversight) have zero public meeting documentation. MCC's status is unclear — page exists but contains no actual minutes.

gaps: 3 committees have zero public meeting documentation (CCC, GMC, Oversight)
MCC meeting notes page exists but has no actual minutes — just a format change notice
Only OSC publishes video recordings — all other committees are text-only
Parameter Committee minutes stop at Oct 2024 — 18+ months of silence
No standardized format across committees — each documents differently
No published attendance tracking except TSC (which has a 2025 attendance log)
